name: JWT Decoder
description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens with complete data sovereignty. No external transmission. Includes intelligent timestamp parsing and validation. 100% LOCAL.
tool_spotlight_template:
Decode JWTs Without Exposing Secrets

Stop pasting your tokens into online decoders that log your payload. Use our fully client-side JWT decoder to inspect headers and payloads without sending data to any server.

Open JWT Decoder →

name: JSON Formatter
description: Securely format, validate, and minify sensitive JSON payloads entirely in your browser. 100% LOCAL.
tool_spotlight_template:
Format JSON Without Data Leaks

Stop pasting sensitive API responses into online formatters. Our client-side JSON tool handles your data locally, with validation and error highlighting.

Open JSON Formatter →

name: Env Sanitizer
description: Automatically detect and mask secrets in your environment variables before sharing. 100% LOCAL.
tool_spotlight_template:
Sanitize .env Files Before Sharing

Need to share environment variables? Use Env Sanitizer to automatically detect and mask secrets. All processing happens client-side—your data never leaves your browser.

Open Env Sanitizer →

name: Base64 Converter
description: Encode plain text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text entirely in your browser. 100% LOCAL.
tool_spotlight_template:
Secure Local Base64 Encoding

Encode and decode sensitive strings without sending data over the network. Our local Base64 tool handles standard and URL-safe formats instantly in your browser.

Open Base64 Converter →

name: Webhook Debugger
description: Debug webhook integrations with detailed request/response logging. Test endpoints without exposing your dev environment.
tool_spotlight_template:
Debug Webhooks Locally

Building webhook integrations? Use our debugger to inspect payloads, verify signatures, and test endpoints without exposing your dev environment.

Open Webhook Debugger →

name: SQL Formatter
description: Format and beautify SQL queries locally. Keep your database schemas and queries private.
tool_spotlight_template:
Format SQL Queries Privately

Your database queries reveal your schema. Keep them private with our client-side SQL formatter—no server logging, no data exposure.

Open SQL Formatter →

name: SHA Hash Generator
description: Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes in real time using the browser crypto API. 100% LOCAL.
tool_spotlight_template:
Generate Secure Hashes Locally

Need to verify file integrity or generate password hashes? Use our client-side SHA generator with support for SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512.

Open SHA Generator →

name: UUID Generator
description: Generate one or many RFC-style v4 UUIDs locally with uppercase and hyphenless output options. 100% LOCAL.
tool_spotlight_template:
Generate UUIDs Locally

Need unique identifiers for your API resources? Generate RFC-compliant UUIDs client-side with options for uppercase and hyphenless formats.

Open UUID Generator →

name: Password Generator
description: Generate cryptographically secure passwords locally with strength scoring and charset controls. 100% LOCAL.
tool_spotlight_template:
Generate Secure Passwords Locally

Creating API keys or service accounts? Generate cryptographically secure passwords with customizable length and character sets—client-side only.

Open Password Generator →
